questions.question_text: Write short notes on: a Request for Proposal b PAR-2023 c Deviated item w.r.t a BOQ. d Non Schedule Item e Defect Liability Period in a contracting contract f Earnest Money Deposit g Performance Bank Guarantee h Liquidated Damage
Explain in detail the importance and use of “Material Specifications” in Architectural practice.
Explain the use of material specifications connected to livelihood generation and the promotion of indigenous and appropriate construction materials?
Draw a sketch of a 2bhk plan of a residence and calculate all types of Areas.
Prepare a rough cost estimate for constructing a Nine-storey high School building with a total built-up area of 12000 sq.m, using PAR 2023 for required data, if any)

Explain the standard deductions considered in quantity estimation for 12mm thick cement-sand plaster. Additionally, compute the dry volume of materials required to plaster a 25m × 3m wall without any openings.
What is BOQ? Create the Format of a BOQ for civil works of a commercial building project.

What are the main types of architectural design competitions held in India? Also, using the 80:20 QCBS system, determine the winner among five participants based on assumed technical and financial scores.
What is Tendering process? Explain with a suitable example how bid are regulated?
